title: Bake Bread from Scratch
body: A simple yeast loaf. Five ingredients (flour, yeast, water, salt, butter) — and the universal lesson that the best things wait.

source.label: The White House Cook Book, 1887; Fannie Farmer, 1896
source.ref: The White House Cook Book, 1887; Fannie Farmer, 1896
